messages.text: I love sci-fi flicks and weekend hiking; it's my escape.
Please keep replies concise; I skim on the go.

I'm a fan of long-form writing and a good cup of coffee.

Most afternoons I unwind by gardening and reading mystery novels.

Reminder to self: Water the basil on Thursdays.
